about.title: About Us
about.storyP1: We believe childhood should be magical, and its most important moments filled with beauty, joy and genuine emotion. Kiddie Chic isn't just a festive look — it's a child's shining eyes, the delight of trying it on, and memories that stay with the family forever.
about.storyP2: The Kiddie Chic collection features over 300 designs for any occasion. Exquisite design, quality fabrics, flawless craftsmanship and attention to every detail create the recognizable Kiddie Chic style.
about.storyP3: Thousands of happy customers from Ukraine and around the world have already chosen us. A personal approach matters to us, so we help you choose the right look, take the child's measurements into account, and make sure every order brings only pleasant impressions.
about.storyP4: Since 2023, a Kiddie Chic showroom has been operating in the very heart of Kyiv — a place where you can try on our designs, get a consultation, and find the look in which every girl will feel special.
about.storyP5: Kiddie Chic — creating beauty for childhood's most precious memories.
about.value1Text: Premium fabrics, natural lining for comfort, attention to detail.
about.value2Text: Unique designs, trending styles and exquisite accessories.
about.value3Text: We are always in touch and will help you find the perfect look for your beauty.
about.showroomText: Visit us to find the best for your most precious moments.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.mapTitle: Kiddie Chic showroom on the map

terms.title: Order terms
terms.introP1: The showroom features only part of our collection, with some options available in each size. If you need a look urgently, we'll help you choose from what's in stock during a consultation in a convenient messenger.
terms.introP2: If you've already chosen the exact look you want, we recommend placing your order on the website in advance. General production times: main collection — 2 weeks, couture collection — 4 weeks.
terms.onlineSiteDesc: You can place an order online via the «Cart» on our website at any convenient time (24/7).
terms.processingDesc: Orders are processed daily from 11:00 to 19:00. If you placed an order outside of working hours, we will contact you at the start of the next working day.
terms.confirmationDesc: After placing your order, you will receive an automatic email, and our manager may contact you via messenger or phone to confirm the details.
terms.payOnlineDesc: Fast and secure card payment (Visa/Mastercard) directly during checkout via the ПУМБ / Hutko payment system.
terms.deliveryItem1: All orders are shipped by Nova Poshta across Ukraine, and delivery abroad is also available.
terms.deliveryItem2: You can choose delivery to a branch, parcel locker, or select courier delivery.
terms.deliveryItem3: Delivery costs are calculated according to the carrier's rates and are paid by the buyer upon receipt.

footer.tagline: Festive looks for little beauties. Handmade, finest fabrics, delivery across Ukraine and abroad.

cookies.message: We use cookies to improve the experience on our site.
